retry_reason: Failure (NULL) means the target was not found in the list; retrying with the same starget will keep returning NULL unless the list changes externally, which is not a typical retry scenario.
contract_summary: This function looks up an ibmvfc_target by its SCSI target ID from the host's target list and, if found, increments the target's kref reference count via kref_get. The caller receives a pointer to the target with an additional reference; the caller must eventually release this reference (e.g., by calling kref_put or a dedicated put function). If the target is not present in the list, returns NULL and no reference is taken. The function does not allocate or create targets; it only retrieves and references existing ones. Proper synchronization (e.g., holding the appropriate lock) is expected when calling this function, as it accesses a shared list.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to look up a target and acquire a kref reference on it; the only non-refcount logic is the list iteration and ID comparison. The function is a straightforward get-wrapper: it returns the object with an incremented refcount, or NULL if not found.
